case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. NOREEN BODINO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17214042) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-19-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 18001033)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-31-2017

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN $1,470.36 PRINCIPAL, $324.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,794.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17214042)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17171039), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED MAY-28-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-29-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 17214016) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $324.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17214042) AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN
NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 17214016) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-18-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 17204002) AS TO DEFENDANT BODINO, NOREEN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17214042) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 17214042) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 18051039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-18-2017 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-18-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
